task_description: Phase 12: QuantMail Gmail Killer - AI Email Features. Create 12 AI-powered email services and 5 infrastructure services with full test coverage and Fastify routes.

verification.summary: All 145 tests pass across 20 test files. No TypeScript errors in new Phase 12 files. Review issues addressed: batch limits added, auth on tracker endpoints, concurrent batch processing, PGP marked as placeholder, in-memory state documented.
